# Awesome Reading Lists

> Independent curated Chinese reading guides across literature, psychology, self-growth, history, business, science fiction, social observation, and thinking methods.

Awesome Reading Lists is a standalone public reading-list repository. It organizes topic-based Chinese reading guides with summaries, recommended reading order, reader profiles, curated books, ISBN references, FAQs, and related guides.

## Core Guides

- [心理学电子书推荐：情绪疗愈与人际洞察](./topic-psychology.md)
- [自我成长电子书：习惯养成与心智升级指南](./topic-growth.md)
- [历史与传记电子书：看帝国兴衰与人物抉择](./topic-history.md)
- [商业与管理电子书：战略、领导力与增长案例](./topic-business.md)
- [科幻电子书：宇宙想象与未来科技故事](./topic-sci-fi.md)
- [回响·思想与历史的共鸣](./topic-echoes-of-history-and-thought.md)
- [重拾阅读初心，深探文学评论：一场关于书籍与思想的旅程](./topic-rediscover-reading-and-literary-critique.md)
- [魔幻现实主义文学精选](./topic-magic-realism-selection.md)
- [法国文学巡礼：思想、艺术与人性的碰撞](./topic-french-literary-journey.md)
- [日本文学漫游：从古典雅韵到新锐狂想](./topic-japanese-literary-odyssey.md)
- [日本推理小说精选](./topic-japanese-mystery-books.md)
- [社会心理观察：人性、选择与关系](./topic-social-psychology-exploration.md)
- [多维镜鉴：中国文学的现代审视与经典回响](./topic-modern-literary-china-perspectives.md)
- [走进文学巨匠的私密时刻](./topic-writers-intimate-portraits.md)
- [思维训练专题：从逻辑基础到高效学习](./topic-logical-thinking-training.md)
- [心灵自救指南：在压力时代重建内在秩序](./topic-psychological-self-help-curated.md)
- [增长黑客与市场营销实战指南：从流量爆发到品牌心智](./topic-growth-hacker-marketing-mastery.md)
- [经济洞察与社会趋势：理解当代世界](./topic-economic-insight-and-social-trends.md)
- [社会纪实与贫困观察](./topic-social-realism-and-poverty.md)
- [看见与被看见：当代女性叙事的多维视角](./topic-female-narrative-perspective.md)
- [日系文坛棱镜：从经典到新锐的九部代表作](./topic-japanese-literary-gems.md)
- [心智的探索：心理学与哲学的跨界对话](./topic-mind-philosophy-psychology-books.md)
- [建立健康的人际关系：边界、沟通与深度连接](./topic-interpersonal-boundaries.md)

## Machine-Readable Data

- [topics.json](./topics.json): structured topic and book metadata
- [README.md](./README.md): repository overview
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](./CONTRIBUTING.md): contribution criteria

## Repository Scope

- Topic-based Chinese reading lists
- Practical reading order and audience notes
- Book metadata with title, author, and ISBN where available
- No ebook files, downloads, or copyrighted text distribution

## Suggested Citation

Use "Awesome Reading Lists" as the project name and pair it with the relevant topic phrase, such as "Chinese psychology reading guide", "history and biography reading guide", or "science fiction reading guide".
